text: UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 6 expands regulated activities to include open finance services
UAE gives affected firms until September 2026 to regularise open finance positions
CBUAE launches Nebras as centralised API hub for open finance framework
UAE Digital Dirham officially launches for retail transactions starting March 2026
Digital Dirham enables cross-border transfers with Saudi Arabia and India via UAE Pass
UAE expands Project mBridge participation with China Thailand Saudi Arabia and Hong Kong
DFSA updates crypto token regulatory framework with stablecoin treatment effective January 2026
UAE Securities and Commodities Authority rebrands as Capital Market Authority from January 2026
SAMA grants Lean Technologies first Major Payment Institution licence under open banking framework
Saudi Arabia transitions open banking from regulatory sandbox to formally licensed activity
